tasks.label: Start Backend
tasks.command: fuser -k 8000/tcp || true && cd backend && source ../.venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload

tasks.label: Start Landing
tasks.command: fuser -k 5173/tcp || true && cd frontend/landing && npm run dev -- --host

tasks.label: Start Dashboard
tasks.command: fuser -k 5175/tcp || true && cd frontend/dashboard && npm run dev -- --host --port 5175
